h2: Before and After Modern Farmhouse Fireplace Makeover
Dark Blue Fireplace In The Bedroom? Yes, Please!

paragraphs: Pairing a TV with a gas linear fireplace creates a sleek, stylish focal point in your living room. Our gas linear fireplaces come with advanced heat management solutions, ensuring you get the look you love without sacrificing functionality or safety.
When mounting a TV above a fireplace, managing heat is crucial to ensure the longevity of your electronics and the safety of your home. Heat & Glo offers several advanced technologies to help!

Allows heat to disperse naturally, without a fan, into the room through a side, front or open wall register, reducing wall surface temperatures. This allows you to place a TV just 12 inches above the fireplace opening without a mantel. Here are the passive heat fireplace options.

Only available on the Cosmo gas fireplace series, SmartWall technology allows you to move heat to another part of your home, up to 20 feet away, so you can mount a TV 12 inches above the fireplace without a mantel. (Continuous fan operation and minimum guidelines must be followed.)

Draw heat from your fireplace to an adjacent room in your home, up to 20 feet away. When a Heat-Zone® kit is run continuously, it can redirect up to 25% of the heat to another area, reducing wall temperatures above the fireplace.

Draw heat from your fireplace and direct it outside, up to 25 feet away. When operating continuously on high, it can redirect up to 40% of the heat off the fireplace, while reducing wall temperatures above the fireplace.
PowerFlow™ Heat Management Technology

Available only on the Primo II gas fireplace series, PowerFlow™ redirects the flow of the heat, sending warmth where you want it, all while maintaining safe outer glass and a cool wall. Quickly adjust heat distribution throughout your space, inside or outside the home, at the flip of a switch.

For a harmonious and balanced living room, matching the length of your fireplace to your TV is key. This creates a cohesive look, making the setup feel intentional and well-designed. Here are a few tips:

Measure the length of your TV and fireplace. Ideally, they should be of a similar size to create visual balance. Gas linear fireplaces are available in a range of sizes, from 36 inches to 72 inches long, with customizable sizes at Stellar by Heat & Glo.

Ensure the TV is mounted at a comfortable viewing height. Consider the distance from your seating area to avoid straining your neck. With Heat & Glo’s heat management technology, TVs can be placed as close to the fireplace as 12 inches without a mantel.
Choose complementary styles for your TV and fireplace. If you have a modern TV, opt for a sleek, contemporary fireplace design. Such as the Primo II above.

By matching the length of your fireplace to your TV and selecting advanced heat management solutions, you can create a beautiful, functional focal point in your living room. This not only enhances the aesthetics but also maximizes the efficiency and safety of your setup, making your living space both stylish and cozy. Browse our linear fireplaces for the modern look you love and the functionality you need.

The Mezzo linear gas fireplace features one of the cleanest designs in the industry, punctuated by end-to-end ribbon flames. A wide range of sizes and styles help make Mezzo yours – including trendy fire bed materials and timeless log sets – and heat-management options so you can enjoy the beauty of this linear fireplace near your TV. Available in 36-inch, 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

Enjoy a sophisticated fire at a smaller footprint, thanks to the sleek design of the Cosmo gas linear fireplace. Personalize the look with a range of fronts, log sets and interior options. Heat management makes it safe to install your TV above the fireplace, with just mere inches in between. Available in 32, 36 and 42-inch widths.

Create a fireside experience that complements your sleek style. Built-in heat management makes it safe to install your TV above this fireplace. Tailor it to your interior design style by choosing from a range of interior panels, fire bed materials, and hand-painted logs. Available in 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.
